<doctag><picture><loc_57><loc_29><loc_104><loc_53></picture>
<section_header_level_1><loc_138><loc_29><loc_273><loc_44>PMEG3010EB</section_header_level_1>
<text><loc_138><loc_47><loc_379><loc_55>30 V, 1 A very low VF Schottky barrier rectifier</text>
<text><loc_138><loc_57><loc_207><loc_64>8 October 2024</text>
<text><loc_374><loc_57><loc_461><loc_64>Product data sheet</text>
<section_header_level_1><loc_42><loc_98><loc_172><loc_107>1. General description</section_header_level_1>
<text><loc_126><loc_113><loc_455><loc_125>Planar Schottky barrier rectifier with an integrated guard ring for stress protection, encapsulated in a SOD523 (SC-79) ultra small and flat lead Surface-Mounted Device (SMD) plastic package.</text>
<section_header_level_1><loc_42><loc_134><loc_183><loc_143>2. Features and benefits</section_header_level_1>
<unordered_list><list_item><loc_125><loc_149><loc_223><loc_155>· Forward current: I$_{F}$ ≤ 1 A</list_item>
<list_item><loc_125><loc_156><loc_233><loc_162>· Reverse voltage: V$_{R}$ ≤ 30 V</list_item>
<list_item><loc_125><loc_163><loc_222><loc_169>· Very low forward voltage</list_item>
<list_item><loc_125><loc_170><loc_292><loc_176>· Ultra small and flat lead SMD plastic package</list_item>
</unordered_list>
<section_header_level_1><loc_42><loc_185><loc_132><loc_194>3. Applications</section_header_level_1>
<unordered_list><list_item><loc_125><loc_199><loc_221><loc_205>· Low voltage rectification</list_item>
<list_item><loc_125><loc_206><loc_263><loc_212>· High efficiency DC-to-DC conversion</list_item>
<list_item><loc_125><loc_213><loc_230><loc_219>· Switch mode power supply</list_item>
<list_item><loc_125><loc_220><loc_230><loc_226>· Reverse polarity protection</list_item>
<list_item><loc_125><loc_227><loc_264><loc_233>· Low power consumption applications</list_item>
</unordered_list>
<section_header_level_1><loc_42><loc_243><loc_177><loc_252>4. Quick reference data</section_header_level_1>
<otsl><loc_41><loc_262><loc_458><loc_310><fcel>Symbol<fcel>Parameter<fcel>Conditions<fcel>Min<fcel>Typ<fcel>Max<fcel>Unit<nl><fcel>I$_{F}$<fcel>forward current<fcel>T$_{sp}$ ≤ 55 °C<fcel>-<fcel>-<fcel>1<fcel>A<nl><fcel>V$_{R}$<fcel>reverse voltage<ecel><ecel><fcel>-<fcel>30<fcel>V<nl><fcel>V$_{F}$<fcel>forward voltage<fcel>I$_{F}$ = 1 A; pulsed; t$_{p}$ ≤ 300 µs; δ ≤ 0.02;  Tamb = 25 °C<ecel><fcel>-<fcel>610<fcel>680<nl><caption><loc_42><loc_260><loc_149><loc_266>Table 1. Quick reference data</caption></otsl>
<section_header_level_1><loc_42><loc_320><loc_172><loc_329>5. Pinning information</section_header_level_1>
<otsl><loc_41><loc_343><loc_458><loc_387><fcel>Pin<fcel>Symbol<fcel>Description<fcel>Simplified outline<fcel>Graphic symbol<nl><fcel>1<fcel>K<fcel>cathode[1]<ecel><ecel><nl><fcel>2<fcel>A<fcel>anode<fcel>1<fcel>K 2<nl><ucel><ucel><ucel><fcel>SC-79 (SOD523)<fcel>sym001<nl><caption><loc_42><loc_336><loc_145><loc_342>Table 2. Pinning information</caption></otsl>
<unordered_list><list_item><loc_42><loc_393><loc_175><loc_399>[1] The marking bar indicates the cathode.</list_item>
